subcodes.first_line: O Thou the Lord of the visible and the invisible, and the Enlightener of all creation! I beseech Thee, by Thy sovereignty
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اله الغیب و الشهود و مربی الوجود اسئلک بسلطنتک المکنونه عن الانظار بان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
